fields.title: Implement Linux process detection
fields.description:
## Task

Implement the core detection logic for Linux using `/proc`.

## File

- `extensions/tau/src/sandbox/agent-awareness/detection.ts`

## API

- `listPiProcesses(): Array<{ pid: number; cwd: string }>`
  - Uses `pgrep -x pi` (best-effort)
  - Reads `/proc/<pid>/cwd` symlink
  - Filters failures (process may exit)

- `isOverlapping(ourCwd: string, ourGitRoot: string | null, theirCwd: string): boolean`
  - Same dir, ancestor/descendant relationship
  - Same git root (use `discoverWorkspaceRoot` output as git root)

- `countOverlappingAgents(ourCwd: string, ourGitRoot: string | null): { count: number; pids: number[] }`
  - Excludes `process.pid`
  - Returns count + pids for richer notices

- `isLinux(): boolean`

## Notes

- For non-Linux, return `{count: 0, pids: []}`.
- Must never throw (safety feature).

## DoD

- Implemented + exported
- Unit tests for `isOverlapping` path cases
fields.close_reason: Implemented Linux /proc-based pi process detection and overlap counting
